site.name: BadgerNet 4.0
site.tagline: Where UW–Madison students and alumni go — data-driven views (in progress).

methodology_blurb: This app loads static JSON from /data. Industry supports an optional major filter via /data/majors/. Tabs include Post-grad, International (including IPEDS context where present), World map (sample destination flows), Vizualive (synthetic path tree + force-layout bubbles), Notable alumni (Wikidata-backed entries with source_url), and three Origins levels. Career flow may use sankey aggregates; replace synthetic data with UW surveys and reviewed LinkedIn rollups in production.
